properties.name: app.upload.dir
properties.description: Filesystem directory where uploaded files are stored

properties.name: app.upload.url-prefix
properties.description: Public URL prefix to access uploaded files (e.g. /uploads)

properties.name: app.upload.public-base-url
properties.description: Public base URL of the API used to build absolute file URLs (e.g. http://localhost:8080)

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in seconds
